properties.name: Title#4201:2
properties.default: Tell Einar Gustafsson: Your Buyout Bid Is Now Tied to Catch Fraud

properties.name: Subtitle#4201:4
properties.default: Einar Gustafsson, former CEO of American Seafoods, is leading a rival bid to acquire the company from Bregal Partners. The Northern Eagle enforcement action directly affects the asset's regulatory standing, liability exposure, and acquisition timeline. Gustafsson has enormous reputational skin in the game — he cannot credibly position himself as a sustainability-focused buyer while the company is under federal investigation for systemic catch underreporting. Pressure him to demand governance reforms as a condition of his bid, or walk away publicly.
